hooks.command: changed=$(git diff HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE "apps/frontend/src/(components|app)/.*\.(tsx|ts)$"; then if ! echo "$changed" | grep -q "apps/frontend/src/messages/"; then echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  UI components were modified but no translation files were updated. If any user-visible text was added or changed, update apps/frontend/src/messages/ for all 10 languages (en, fr, es, de, it, jp, pt, ar, zh, ko)."}'; fi; fi
